summary: The Goshen Township Zoning Commission held a public hearing on Zoning Case DZC2023-006, a request for a minor modification to the Lakefield Place Section Two PUD. The modification would change condominiums from a single parcel into individual parcels. Staff recommended approval, and the Zoning Commission unanimously approved the minor modification.
decisions: Approved minutes of a prior meeting (with some abstentions/absences noted)
Approved minor modification to Lakefield Place Section Two PUD (Zoning Case 2023-006) — unanimous yes from Currie, Dinwiddie, Frisbee, Lewis, Otke, and Pegram
notable_topics: Minor modification to Lakefield Place Section Two PUD to split condominium units from a single parcel into individual parcels
Staff finding that code provisions were geared toward single-family homes and condominiums were previously approved
attendees: Scott Huber (Site Civil Engineer, Abercrombie & Associates)
notes: This appears to be a Zoning Commission meeting rather than a Board of Trustees meeting, despite repeated references to the Board of Trustees in the transcript. The transcript contains significant audio/transcription artifacts and repeated boilerplate text, making portions difficult to interpret. Max Merritt noted this was his first Zoning Commission meeting with Goshen Township. Next meeting scheduled for November 7, 2023.
title: ZC 10-3-2023
